mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in PAYEMS signals expanding household income and lower near-term recession risk, causing higher expected corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value was 135489.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month PAYEMS momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of triggered months over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals deteriorating labor demand and weakening household cash flow, causing investors to cut earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value was 7.2 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if this UNRATE trigger is followed by nonnegative 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: An upward crossing in FEDFUNDS marks the start of discount-rate tightening; higher short rates reduce the present value of future equity cash flows and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises above its 12-month moving average after being below it for at least 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value was 0.16 as of t-1mo
regime_hint: monetary tightening transition from zero-rate policy
failure_condition: Reject if triggered tightening transitions have average 60-day S&P 500 returns greater than the unconditional 60-day average in the walk-forward sample.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS growth is positive while CPIAUCSL inflation is contained, real consumption demand is expanding without margin-damaging price pressure, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth is positive and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation is below 3%
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value was 343242.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint RSAFS-CPIAUCSL trigger delivers a 20-day forward hit rate below 50% or a mean return below the unconditional mean over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO over the prior 3 months signals improving capacity utilization and goods-sector output, raising expected cyclical earnings and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value was 106.1173 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO momentum has a 60-day forward return Rank IC below 0.03 across two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST signals weakening residential investment and reduced demand for housing-linked durable goods, causing lower expected earnings and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% over 3 months or crosses below its 12-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value was 625.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains flat and low, real policy rates fall, liquidity conditions ease, and nominal revenue expectations rise, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation accelerates and FEDFUNDS stays below 1% with no increase over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value was 213.06 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS trigger has negative average 5-day S&P 500 returns or a hit rate below 50% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A GDPC1 contraction combined with a rising UNRATE identifies recession onset, forcing downward revisions to aggregate earnings and causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth is negative and UNRATE rises by more than 0.2 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest snapshot value was 11712.4 as of t-6mo
failure_condition: Reject if the combined GDPC1-UNRATE recession trigger is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward triggered cases.
